text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. If I combine this with the method I
tried yesterday... hmm, interesting.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
choice_data_list: You seem sleepy all the time lately.
You seem sleepy all the time lately.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I imported a few feng shui books from
overseas, and they all have super interesting
concepts.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been so caught up in reading and trying them
out that I haven't been getting much sleep.
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's good that Copano Rickey's passionate about
studying, but she's clearly sleep deprived.
